home.tagline: Interior Design that transforms spaces into experiences
home.aboutTeaser: I believe every space tells a story. With over 10 years of experience, I create environments that unite functionality, beauty, and identity.
home.blogTeaser: Reflections on design, references, and the art of creating spaces that endure.
home.questionnaireSectionBody: Fill out the briefing questionnaire and tell me about your space, style, and dreams. With this information, I can create a truly personalized proposal for you.

project.whatsappCta: I want a project like this
project.whatsappMessage: Hello Carol, I'm interested in the {title} project and would like to know more.

about.title: About Carol Orofino
about.bio: Carol Orofino is an interior designer with a specialization in Sustainable Design. Over more than 10 years of career, she has developed residential and commercial projects that translate the personality of her clients into unique and functional spaces.
about.philosophyText: I believe interior design goes beyond aesthetics. It's about creating spaces that transform the experience of those who live in them — spaces that inspire, welcome, and endure.
about.customBody: Every project begins with careful listening. Understanding your lifestyle, your tastes, and the way you use each space is what allows us to create truly unique environments — functional, welcoming, and in harmony with who you are. A personalized project isn't just more beautiful; it's one that keeps making sense long after you've settled in.
about.ctaWhatsappMessage: Hello Carol, I'd like to know more about your services.

contact.title: Contact
contact.whatsappMessage: Hello Carol, I'd like to know more about your services.

blog.title: Journal
blog.subtitle: Design, references & inspiration
blog.sidebarCtaBody: Carol Orofino takes on residential and commercial projects across Brazil.

s1.label: 01 — Strategy
s1.title:
Design that
works for you
s1.p1: In a commercial space, the environment speaks before you do. It conveys seriousness, personality, or warmth — sometimes all three at once.
s1.p2: I work to ensure every detail — layout, furniture, light, palette — reinforces who you are and what you want to convey.

s2.label: 02 — Execution
s2.title:
Spaces that
stay with you
s2.p1: From briefing to delivery, I oversee every step: technical design, materials, suppliers, construction.
s2.p2: The goal is always the same — a space people want to return to, that reinforces your brand's credibility and works flawlessly every day.

cta.title: Let's design your space?
cta.body: Tell me about your business and what you need from the space.

s1.label: 01 — Approach
s1.title:
A home made
just for you
s1.p1: Before any line is drawn, I listen. How you wake up, how you entertain, what drains you about your current space, what you can't live without.
s1.p2: Only then does the project begin — one that unites what is beautiful with what truly works for your life.

s2.label: 02 — Result
s2.title:
Spaces that
welcome
s2.p1: From a compact apartment to a spacious house, the care is the same: materials that age beautifully, light that transforms, each piece in the right place.
s2.p2: The result is a home that feels like it was always that way — and one you won't want to leave.

cta.title: Let's create your home?
cta.body: Tell me about your space and what you dream for it.

s1.label: 01 — Process
s1.title:
From concept
to delivery
s1.p1: I start by listening. The routine, the tastes, what bothers you about the current space, what's missing. Only then comes the project — concept, moodboard, 3D, and on-site supervision until the day of delivery.
s1.p2: The result is a space that feels like it was always that way: as if it couldn't be any other way.

s2.label: 02 — Philosophy
s2.title:
Spaces that
transform
s2.p1: Interior design isn't decoration. It's the difference between a space you inhabit and a space that belongs to you.
s2.p2: Every material, every proportion, every light source is chosen with intention — so the whole environment speaks the same language.

cta.title: Let's create together?
cta.body: Tell me about your space and what you dream for it.

s1.label: 01 — Kitchen
s1.title:
Practicality
and beauty
s1.p1: The kitchen is the heart of the home. Custom cabinets, well-proportioned countertops, and thoughtful lighting make all the difference in everyday life.
s1.p2: Every centimeter designed around your lifestyle.

s2.label: 02 — Studio
s2.title:
Space for
focus and creativity
s2.p1: A well-designed workspace goes beyond a desk and a chair. Organization, light, and the right flow create the ideal setting for quality work.
s2.p2: Because the place where you work deserves the same care.

s3.label: 03 — Bedroom
s3.title:
A place to
truly rest
s3.p1: The bedroom needs to be a sanctuary. Warming materials, a calming palette, and furniture that fits the rhythm of the person living there.
s3.p2: Every decision made so you feel you've truly arrived home.

s4.label: 04 — Bathroom
s4.title:
A space
for well-being
s4.p1: The bathroom is no longer just about utility. With the right materials and a balanced composition, it becomes a place of rest and renewal.
s4.p2: Elegance in the details you touch and see every day.

cta.title: Ready to start?
cta.body: Tell me about your space and let's create something incredible together.

inspireSe.metaDescription: Interior design styles that translate personality into unique spaces.

cta.title: Shall we create together?
cta.body: Tell me about your space and what you dream for it.

classicos.title: Classics
classicos.text: Classic style values timeless elegance, sophistication, and harmony. It is built on structured pieces, impeccable cuts, and balanced design — independent of passing trends. A style that conveys confidence, authority, and refinement, prioritizing quality, durability, and versatility in both fashion and décor.

contemporaneo.title: Contemporary
contemporaneo.text: Contemporary style is the design of the present moment, shaped by constant evolution and adaptation to new trends. It values functionality, comfort, and sophistication, creating balanced and modern environments. Key traits include clean lines, integrated spaces, and a simple aesthetic free of excess.

minimalista.title: Minimalist
minimalista.text: Minimalist style is built on the concept of 'less is more,' prioritizing simplicity, functionality, and the elimination of excess. It values organized spaces, straight lines, few elements, and high-quality materials — creating elegant, light, and timeless environments.

escandinavo.title: Scandinavian
escandinavo.text: Scandinavian style is an aesthetic that blends minimalism, functionality, and coziness, inspired by the Nordic countries. It values bright, organized, well-lit environments with simple furniture and clean design. The strong presence of natural materials such as light wood and soft fabrics brings balance and comfort to the space.

industrial.title: Industrial
industrial.text: Industrial style draws inspiration from old factories and urban warehouses, celebrating a raw, functional, and personality-filled aesthetic. It highlights rough materials, exposed structures, and open spaces — modern and understated. The concept is to show the bare bones of the space, turning elements like pipes and beams into part of the design.

japandi.title: Japandi
japandi.text: Japandi style is the fusion of Scandinavian design and Japanese aesthetics, uniting functionality, simplicity, and warmth. It blends zen minimalism with Nordic comfort, creating balanced, elegant, and welcoming environments. It honors the essential, nature, and the beauty of imperfection (wabi-sabi).

boho.title: Boho
boho.text: Boho style is a free, creative, and personality-rich aesthetic that mixes hippie, ethnic, and vintage influences. It values comfort, nature, and craftsmanship, creating relaxed, welcoming, and unique spaces. Décor layers textures, natural furniture, plants, and storied pieces — without rigid rules.

moderno.title: Modern
moderno.text: Modern style is defined by functionality, simplicity, and geometric forms, following the principle that form follows function. It values integrated, well-lit, and organized spaces with clean design free of excess. The aesthetic is rational and elegant, focused on practicality and the connection between interior and exterior.

rustico.title: Rustic
rustico.text: Rustic style values naturalness, simplicity, and a connection to nature, bringing the cozy feel of the countryside into every space. It uses raw materials such as wood, stone, and iron, highlighting textures, imperfections, and natural finishes. Spaces are warm, comfortable, and full of character.

provencal.title: Provençal
provencal.text: Provençal style is inspired by the countryside homes of southern France, blending rustic charm with classic elegance. It creates romantic, light, and welcoming environments with weathered wooden furniture, curved details, and handcrafted elements. The décor celebrates delicate textures, floral prints, and natural materials such as linen, iron, and ceramic.
